acid-lime.$description: Acid Lime — Green action color for filled buttons, selected navigation states, and focused conversion moments

obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Body and heading text, dominant border color, dark section canvas — near-pure black for maximum contrast

pure-black.$description: Pure Black — High-frequency borders, icons, decorative strokes, image outlines — the structural black that outlines every other element

bone-white.$description: Bone White — Light section canvas, card surfaces, inverted text on dark sections and lime buttons

fog.$description: Fog — Placeholder surfaces, muted image backgrounds, subtle borders, disabled state fills

slate.$description: Slate — Secondary dark surfaces, dark mode card backgrounds, subdued text on dark canvases

fk-raster-grotesk-compact-trial-sharp.$value: FK Raster Grotesk Compact Trial Sharp
fk-raster-grotesk-compact-trial-sharp.$description: Display headlines for section titles (e.g. 'FEATURED WORK'). The wide, compact, near-square grotesque proportions at 32–48px with 1.0 line-height and +0.042em tracking are the site's signature — every section is announced with this single cut, no fallback weights exist

ibm-plex-mono.$description: All uppercase labels, metadata tags, navigation items, technical strings, section indices like '014 — TODAY' and '[GOOD DESIGN AWARD WINNER 2023/24]'. The 0.086em–0.109em positive tracking on the 10–11px sizes is the monospace's defining behavior — tiny, widely-spaced, all-caps annotations that read like typeset engineering labels

be-vietnam-pro.$description: Long-form body copy and link text. Stays at 16px only — the design avoids type-size variation in body text, relying on monospace labels for hierarchy instead

inter-medium.$description: Button text — the one place a humanist sans is used at 500 weight with slight negative tracking for legibility in small pill CTAs

system-sans-serif.$description: Icon-adjacent micro-text and fallback rendering for system UI

$value.fontFamily: FK Raster Grotesk Compact Trial Sharp
FK Raster Grotesk Compact Trial Sharp

bone-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Default light section background, hero, project galleries

acid-highlight.$description: Surface level 1: Time badge, contact CTA, occasional section accent

fog-plate.$description: Surface level 2: Image placeholders, product mockup backgrounds, neutral cards

slate-card.$description: Surface level 3: Elevated dark surface inside dark sections

obsidian-ground.$description: Surface level 4: Dark contact/footer section, near-black canvas
